Julia Turshen is a best-selling cookbook author, home cook, podcast host, and food-equity advocate. Her newest cookbook, Simply Julia: 110 Easy Recipes for Healthy Comfort Food, is out March 2. She also founded Equity at the Table, an inclusive digital directory of women and non-binary individuals within the food industry. Here’s how she gets it done. - THE CUT
